scripts.build: esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --platform=browser --target=chrome100 && esbuild src/options.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/options.js --platform=browser --target=chrome100 && cp src/options.html dist/options.html
scripts.version: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const p = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json')); const m = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json')); m.version = p.version; fs.writeFileSync('manifest.json', JSON.stringify(m, null, 2) + '\n');" && git add manifest.json
scripts.pack: npm run build && rm -f dist/score.* dist/*.d.ts dist/*.d.ts.map && zip -r smart-youtube-feed.zip manifest.json dist/ icons/
